matches.match_rationale: The core problem is data schema mismatches across SIS, LMS, Finance, and HR systems — exactly what AI-assisted ETL mapping addresses. When SIS schema changes, an AI transformation layer can automatically remap fields to downstream schemas rather than breaking brittle scripts. This directly resolves the 24+ hour data latency and silent batch failures by replacing manual export/import with intelligent, self-healing pipelines.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-assisted integration middleware that maps SIS/LMS/Finance schemas dynamically, detects schema drift, and re-maps field definitions automatically — reducing manual re-wiring when any source system updates.

matches.match_rationale: Nightly batch jobs that fail silently are a textbook anomaly detection use case — the AI monitors integration pipeline outputs (record counts, latency, null rates, schema conformance) and flags deviations from expected behavior before staff discover them the next morning. For a multi-site operator, this replaces the current 'zero visibility' state with proactive alerting on integration health.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An integration health monitoring layer that learns normal data flow patterns per pipeline (e.g., expected nightly enrollment record counts) and alerts IT immediately when jobs fail silently or produce anomalous output.

matches.match_rationale: The entire integration estate — manual exports, imports, brittle point-to-point scripts, nightly batch jobs — is a task automation problem. An AI agent can orchestrate multi-system data sync workflows with error handling, retry logic, and conditional branching that rule-based RPA cannot handle when schemas shift. The 'each campus IT hire must re-learn fragile integrations' problem is directly solved by encoding integration logic into a governed agent workflow.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An agentic integration platform that replaces ad-hoc scripts with governed, self-documenting data sync agents across SIS/LMS/Finance/HR — including automatic error recovery, logging, and a human-in-the-loop escalation path when sync fails.

matches.match_rationale: The operator's integration scripts are fragile and custom — when SIS schemas change, someone must manually rewrite them. AI code generation can accelerate rebuilding broken integrations, auto-generate SQL/ETL scripts from natural language specs, and produce boilerplate connectors for common education SaaS APIs (Salesforce, Blackbaud, Canvas). This directly reduces the IT labor cost of maintaining point-to-point integrations.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An internal AI coding assistant trained on the operator's integration patterns that generates, documents, and updates data pipeline scripts when schemas change — reducing mean time to repair broken integrations from days to hours.
